text:
TOPIC: Capital Gains Statement
DESCRIPTION: Investors can download their capital gains statement through the CAMS portal used by SBI Mutual Fund.
STEPS: ['Visit the CAMS website', "Select 'Capital Gains Statement'", 'Enter PAN and registered email', 'Download the statement']
SOURCE URL: https://www.camsonline.com/Investors/Statements
TOPIC: Account Statement
DESCRIPTION: Investors can download mutual fund account statements through the SBI Mutual Fund investor service page or through CAMS.
SOURCE URL: https://www.sbimf.com/en-us/investor-service
